name: mesoneer AG
positioning: Swiss software company for digital trust, custom software, process automation, data and AI, data streaming, and secure digital customer journeys.
services: AI consulting and AI application development
Workshops and assessments for digitalization, data, Kafka, and automation
strong_fit_signals: custom software instead of standard software
secure customer journey or digital customer relationship
digital trust or trusted digital transaction
digital onboarding, KYC, identification, eID, electronic signature, QES
workflow, case management, process automation, dynamic forms, dynamic contracts
system integration, API integration, third-party integration, core system integration
event-driven architecture, Kafka, data streaming, data platform, real-time data
AI application, AI agent, smart data, analytics, data governance
regulated industries with security or compliance requirements
modernization of legacy applications or replacement of manual processes
weak_fit_or_negative_signals: pure license, subscription, reseller, or standard software procurement
hardware, workplace, printer, network, telephony, or storage procurement
hosting-only, operations-only, support-only, or maintenance-only tenders
scanning, archiving, or document logistics without workflow, data, or integration scope
vendor-specific partner status or certification as mandatory criterion, unless mesoneer explicitly has the required status
staff leasing without ownership of solution design or delivery
preferred_industries: organizations with complex customer journeys or sensitive data

scoring_guidance.score_9_10: Clear strategic fit: digital trust, onboarding, identification, electronic signature, custom software, workflow automation, data streaming, or AI with delivery ownership.
scoring_guidance.score_7_8: Good fit: meaningful engineering, integration, automation, data, AI, or architecture scope, even if not all domains match.
scoring_guidance.score_5_6: Possible fit: broad IT/digitalization project with some relevant signals but unclear implementation ownership or weak Mesoneer differentiation.
scoring_guidance.score_1_4: Weak fit: pure licenses, subscriptions, hardware, hosting, operations, support, scanning/archive logistics, or mandatory vendor partner status without a clear engineering scope.
